# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Create a tar.gz backup archive. Usage: rake 'backup:create[name,/path/to/source]'"
  task :create, [:name, :path] => :environment do |_, args|
    name = args[:name]
    path = args[:path]

    if name.to_s.strip.empty? || path.to_s.strip.empty?
      abort "Usage: rake 'backup:create[name,/path/to/source]'"
    end

    archive = "#{name}.tar.gz"
    cmd = %Q{tar -czf "#{archive}" "#{path}"}

    puts "Running: #{cmd}"
    exec(cmd)
  end
end
